text: A remote control is a device used to operate another device from a distance
original_text: A remote control is a device used to operate another device from a distance.

text: remote controls often use infrared light, radio signals, Bluetooth, or Wi-Fi
original_text: Remote controls often use infrared light, radio signals, Bluetooth, or Wi-Fi.

text: remotes commonly control TVs, speakers, lights, fans, projectors, and streaming devices

text: remote controls are useful until they vanish into couch mythology
original_text: Remote controls are useful until they vanish into couch mythology.
